title: Form - Multiple Submission
excerpt: I would love to see a feature on Monday forms that would allow multiple submissions much easier, or a ‘Duplicate submission’ option that is editable. We currently have an event request form that must be resubmitted by a …

posts.author: LaurenStrobel (Lauren Strobel)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to see a feature on Monday forms that would allow multiple submissions much easier, or a ‘Duplicate submission’ option that is editable. We currently have an event request form that must be resubmitted by a supplier for each new event they would like to run. We continue to use excel instead, due to the fact multiple submissions causes much more work for our supplier and an excel sheet allows them to submit events for the entire year with a single submission.
